zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry W Shuffield於1794年出生在美國北卡羅來納州時，他的父親John Wesley Sheffeild Jr30歲，母親Sarah Diffee28歲。他於大約1824年與Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1860年住在美國阿肯色州卡羅爾達爾 堂史普且於1870年住在美國阿肯色州。他去世於1862年11月15日在美國阿肯色州克拉克享年68歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林俾斯麥俾斯麥 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry W Shuffield于1794年出生在美国北卡罗来纳州时，他的父亲John Wesley Sheffeild Jr30岁，母亲Sarah Diffee28岁。他于大约1824年与Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1860年住在美国阿肯色州卡羅爾達爾 堂史普且于1870年住在美国阿肯色州。他去世于1862年11月15日在美国阿肯色州克拉克享年68岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林俾斯麥俾斯麥 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Shuffield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Sheffield  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sheffield
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Sheffield (Yorkshire), but perhaps also from Sheffield Bottom in Burghfield (Berkshire), or Sheffield Park in Fletching (Sussex). The Yorkshire place takes its name from the river Sheaf, itself from Old English scēath ‘boundary’, + Old English feld ‘open country’, while the Berkshire placename derives from Old English scēo ‘shelter’ + feld. The Sussex placename comes from Old English scēap ‘sheep’ + feld.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Gold Nuggets Found
historicEvents.description: "In 1799, in Little Meadow Creak located in Cabarrus County, North Carolina a large yellow """"rock"""" was found by Conrad Reed. A few years later it was determined that the """"rock"""" was a gold nugget."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Legends of America- Reed Gold Mine, North Carolina- First Gold Discovery

historicEvents.description: War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: Trail of Tears
historicEvents.description: In the 1830's, President Jackson called for all the Native Americans to be forced off their own land. As the Cherokee were forced out of North Carolina many of them hid in the mountains of North Carolina.
historicEvents.urlTitle: North Carolina Trail of Tears Association

historicEvents.description: U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

historicEvents.title: First State Fair
historicEvents.description: The first state fair in North Carolina was held in Raleigh and was put on by the North Carolina State Agricultural Society in 1853. The fair has been continuous except for during the American Civil War and Reconstruction and WWII.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry W Shuffield was born in 1794, in North Carolina, United States, his father, John Wesley Sheffeild Jr, was 30 and his mother, Sarah Diffee, was 28. He married Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning about 1824. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, United States in 1860 and Arkansas, United States in 1870. He died on 15 November 1862, in Clark, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 68, and was buried in Bismarck Cemetery, Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry W Shuffield est né en 1794, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, son père, John Wesley Sheffeild Jr, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sarah Diffee, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning environ 1824. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1860 et à Arkansas, États-Unis en 1870. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1862, à Clark, Arkansas, États-Unis, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Bismarck Cemetery, Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry W Shuffield 1794 in North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wesley Sheffeild Jr 30 und seine Mutter Sarah Diffee 28. Er hat um 1824 Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1860 hat er in Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten und 1870 in Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 15. November 1862 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Clark, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Bismarck Cemetery, Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry W Shuffield è nato il nel 1794 nel Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, John Wesley Sheffeild Jr, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Diffee, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning circa 1824. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1860 e nel Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1870. Morì il 15 novembre 1862, nel Clark, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Bismarck Cemetery, Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry W Shuffieldが1794年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州で生まれた時，父John Wesley Sheffeild Jrは30歳，母Sarah Diffeeは28歳であった。約1824年にMary Harriet Whitehead Browningと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1860年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州カーロルセダー トウンシュイップに，1870年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州に住んでいた。彼は1862年11月15日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州クラークで68歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングビスマルックビスマルック セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry W Shuffield(이)가 1794년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wesley Sheffeild Jr(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Diffee(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1824년 Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1860년도에 미국 아칸소 주 카로 세더르 타운시프에서, 1870년도에 미국 아칸소 주에서 살았다. 그는 1862년 11월 15일 미국 아칸소 주 클라르크에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 비스마c크 비스마c크 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry W Shuffield nasceu em 1794, em Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Wesley Sheffeild Jr, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Diffee, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning aproximadamente 1824. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Cedar Township, Carroll, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1860 e em Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1870. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1862, em Clark, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Bismarck Cemetery, Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry W Shuffield родился в 1794 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Wesley Sheffeild Jr было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Diffee, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning около 1824 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности кедар тоуншип, карролл, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1860 году и в местности Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1870 году. Он умер 15 ноября 1862 г. в местности кларк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности бисмаркк кеметири, бисмаркк, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry W Shuffield nació en 1794, en Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Wesley Sheffeild Jr, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sarah Diffee, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning aproximadamente 1824. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1860 y en Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1870. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1862, en Clark, Arkansas, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Bismarck Cemetery, Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Estados Unidos.
